# Skill Induction Research

The skill induction loop has three signals: tool-use patterns, repeated
user corrections, and explicit `/skill` invocations.

Architecture frozen by this note. See [[mvp-roadmap#Phase 12 — Notes tools]]
for the integration plan and [[carlos]] for the parent project.
